data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices architecture, enabling independent development, deployment, and scaling of different platform features.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Kubernetes for container orchestration and Docker for containerization.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: A robust data pipeline architecture that processes billions of events per day for user insights and recommendations.
data.technical_spec: Built on Apache Kafka and Apache Storm for real-time processing.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: CDN setup ensures fast delivery of music content globally.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with Akamai to distribute music files efficiently.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry point for managing and exposing APIs, enhancing security and usability.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using Kong API Gateway to handle requests and authentication.

data.title: High Availability and Load Balancing
data.description: Designed to handle large volumes of simultaneous connections across geographies.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS Elastic Load Balancing and auto-scaling groups.
